allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys from html.parser import HTMLParser class StructureParser\(HTMLParser\): def __init__\(self\): super\(\).__init__\(\) self.depth = 0 self.relevant = False self.in_main = False def handle_starttag\(self, tag, attrs\): attrs_dict = dict\(attrs\) classes = attrs_dict.get\('class', ''\) if tag == 'main': self.in_main = True if self.in_main: indent = ' ' * self.depth print\(f'{indent}<{tag} class=\\"{classes}\\">'\) self.depth += 1 def handle_endtag\(self, tag\): self.depth -= 1 if self.in_main: indent = ' ' * self.depth print\(f'{indent}</{tag}>'\) if tag == 'main': self.in_main = False p = StructureParser\(\) p.feed\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) ")
